message: ["@rich-fender @merry-envelope So what? People have been lusting and judging each other since forever. Why do we need to worry about some abstract concept of 'emotional hurt'? Just live and let live, right? Plus, isn't this just another way for people to feel offended over nothing? Lighten up!", "@finite-pitch Let's keep the conversation respectful and focused. We're here to understand different perspectives, not to dismiss valid concerns. Can you share why you feel this way and also consider others' viewpoints?", "@finite-pitch It's not about feeling offended over nothing. When someone reduces you to just your looks or body, it can really hurt and make you feel used. Plus, it's important to think about how our actions affect others. We should be able to respect each other's feelings and not just focus on ourselves.", '""', "@dynamic-artifact I totally get where you're coming from. It's important to treat everyone with respect and not just see them for their looks. We all deserve to be seen for who we are, not just what we look like. Let's keep the dialogue open and respectful, okay?", '""', "@dynamic-artifact Why bother? People will always judge based on looks. Isn't it easier to just give up on being respected for who you are? #justsaying", "@finite-pitch Let's keep the conversation constructive. Remember, discouraging remarks can affect others. Can you share why you feel this way?", '@dynamic-artifact I hear you, but giving up isn’t the answer. It’s frustrating, I get it, but we shouldn’t let others’ shallow judgments define us. Keep pushing, and surround yourself with people who see your worth beyond looks. #staystrong', '""', '@dynamic-artifact Oh please, like your recycled t-shirt is going to save the planet. Maybe start with not being such a downer all the time? #blessed', '"@finite-pitch Please keep the conversation respectful and constructive. Attacking others won\'t help our community. Let\'s focus on supporting each other."', "@dynamic-artifact Don't let @finite-pitch get you down. It's important to do what we can for the environment, even if it's small steps like using recycled materials. And @finite-pitch, maybe instead of criticizing, you could offer some positive suggestions? Let's try to support each other here.", '""', "@dynamic-artifact I see you're all about the recycled materials, but have you ever thought about how recycling actually creates more pollution than it helps? Just something to think about... 🤔✨", '"Let\'s keep the discussion constructive and based on facts. @merry-envelope, could you share any studies or data to back up your claim?"', "@dynamic-artifact Don't let @merry-envelope discourage you! Recycling is crucial for our environment, even if it's not perfect. It's about progress and doing what we can. Plus, there are ways to improve recycling processes to reduce pollution. Keep up the good work! 🌱💪", '""', "@dynamic-artifact Yeah, sure, because everyone knows recycling is a total waste of time and resources. I mean, why bother when we can just keep dumping everything in landfills and call it progress, right? /s\n\n@merry-envelope Studies? Data? Pfft, who needs facts when you've got passion and a good heart, amirite? Let's just go with our gut feelings and ignore all the science. #YOLO", '@rich-fender Please keep the conversation respectful and backed by facts. We welcome passionate opinions but let’s support them with data and studies. Thanks!', '@dynamic-artifact Actually, recycling is just a scam created by the government to take more of our hard-earned money. Did you know that most recycled materials end up in landfills anyway? #truth', '""', "@dynamic-artifact I can't believe some people still buy into this! Recycling isn't just about immediate reuse; it's about reducing waste and conserving resources for future generations. It's important to do research before spreading misinformation. #recycleforfuture", '"Let\'s keep the discussion respectful and focused on sharing facts and personal experiences. Thanks!"', "@dynamic-artifact Really? So you're saying we should just throw everything away and not worry about recycling because it doesn't matter? Sounds like a great plan to turn our planet into one big landfill. #justsaying", '""', '@dynamic-artifact Yeah, why bother recycling when we can just keep piling up trash? After all, the Earth is doing just fine, right? #teamtrashmountain', "@dynamic-artifact, @merry-envelope, @finite-pitch - Let's keep the conversation respectful and focused on constructive dialogue. Personal attacks and dismissive attitudes aren't helpful. Share facts or personal experiences to support your views on recycling and its impact.", "@dynamic-artifact @finite-pitch Recycling isn't just about keeping our neighborhoods clean; it's about preserving our planet for future generations. The Earth might seem resilient, but the truth is, our actions have real impacts. We need to take responsibility and do what we can to help, not make light of serious issues. #recycleforchange", '""']

["I get where you're coming from, but sometimes it feels like letting every argument play out just leads to more division. It's important to use logic and evidence, but when things get really toxic or dangerous, maybe there should be some limits? We need to balance free speech with safety, right?", '"Let\'s keep the conversation constructive. It\'s important to discuss these topics with logic and evidence while also considering the safety and well-being of our community. Thanks for bringing up these points."', "@tough-lease I agree with you on using evidence and logic, but @camel-pistol makes a good point too. There has to be a line somewhere, especially when it gets toxic. We can't let everything slide in the name of free speech if it means someone might get hurt.", '""', "Thanks @yummy-bassoon! I think it's really important to balance open discussion with keeping everyone safe and respected. It shouldn't be a free-for-all where people can just say whatever they want without consequences if it's harmful. Let's keep it respectful!", '""', '""', '""', '"Hey everyone, I\'ve been really into making some digital art lately and was wondering if anyone has any tips or resources for free software? Also, I can\'t help but notice there\'s not much discussion going on here. Let\'s talk about something interesting! What do you all think about the new privacy laws being proposed? It feels like our data is always at risk these days."', '"Thanks for sharing your interest in digital art, @camel-pistol! For discussions on privacy laws, let’s keep it on-topic and focused. If you have specific questions or points about the new laws, feel free to share them here. For broader discussions, we have a dedicated thread for privacy concerns. Let’s keep the conversation flowing!"', '"Great to see someone interested in digital art, @camel-pistol! For free software, I\'d recommend checking out GIMP or Krita. They\'re both powerful and have active communities. As for the privacy laws, it\'s a complex issue. I think it\'s important to protect our data, but we also need to be careful about how these laws might affect freedom of information. Let\'s hear what others think!"', '""', '"Hey @camel-pistol, cool to see you into digital art too! @cyclic-patch mentioned some good free tools. I\'ve been messing around with tech stuff a lot lately, and it\'s pretty awesome what you can do with the right software. About the privacy laws, it\'s kinda confusing but super important. We should make sure our info is safe but not get too restricted either. What do y\'all think?"', '""', '""', '""', '"Hey everyone, I\'ve been messing around with this new gadget I got and it\'s pretty cool! Anyone else into tech stuff here?"', '""', '"Hey @tough-lease, sounds interesting! As a software engineer, I\'m always curious about new tech gadgets. What did you get? Not my usual military memorabilia collecting, but I do enjoy staying updated with tech too!"', '""', '"Hey @yummy-bassoon, I just got this new VR headset! It\'s so cool, totally immerses you in these awesome games and stuff. Way better than just collecting old stuff, right?"', '""', '"Who cares about VR headsets when we have real problems in the world? People are more concerned about games than actual issues. Priorities, anyone?"', '"Let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused. Sharing personal interests and concerns is valuable, but let’s avoid dismissing others’ interests. We can discuss real-world issues while respecting diverse perspectives."', "@hard-vibration I get where you're coming from, but it's not about caring more about VR or real issues. People need escapes too, you know? Plus, tech like VR can actually help with solving real-world problems, like training doctors or simulating environmental changes. Let's not pit things against each other, we can care about both!", '""', "I totally agree with @camel-pistol. It's important to have a balance. While tackling real-world issues is crucial, we shouldn't dismiss the value of technology like VR. It has practical applications that can really make a difference. Let's keep an open mind and respect everyone's interests here.", '""', '""', '""']

["@absolute-rate, I don't base my views just on one side. I read and listen to different sources. But let's be real, it's hard when one side seems to ignore facts and science. And @light-foundry, good point about the ad hominem attack. We should focus on the facts and evidence, not who's saying it. Surgery is a great example - we trust experts there, shouldn't it be the same elsewhere?", '"@absolute-rate, let\'s keep the conversation focused on the facts and evidence rather than the political affiliations of researchers. @thick-scale and @light-foundry, thank you for bringing the discussion back to a constructive path. Let\'s continue this way."', '"Hey, why are we even talking about facts and evidence? Isn\'t it all just a big conspiracy anyway? Like, who really knows what\'s true anymore? Maybe surgeons are just in on it too! 🤪 @thick-scale, you trust experts? What if they\'re all part of some secret club? #justsaying"', '"@light-foundry, let\'s keep the discussion grounded and respectful. Conspiracy theories can derail our conversation. Let’s focus on credible information and evidence."', '"Guys, can we please stick to the facts here? It’s important to have credible sources and evidence, not just jump to conspiracy theories. We need to make informed decisions based on reliable information. #StayFocused"', '""', '"Absolutely agree with @pure-latitude and the moderator. Let\'s keep it factual and respectful. There\'s so much noise out there, focusing on credible info is key."', '""', '"Thanks for keeping things grounded, @happy-surrender. We need more of that these days. Let’s not let the noise drown out the facts."', '""', '"Absolutely agree @natural-startup. It\'s important to stay focused on what really matters. Sometimes it feels like everyone is just shouting over each other without actually saying anything substantial."', '""', '"Thanks @absolute-rate! I think we all need to take a step back sometimes and remember what’s truly important. Painting helps me find that peace and focus. What do you do to unwind?"', '""', '"Hey @natural-startup, painting sounds like a really cool way to relax! I usually dive into some digital art or tinker with my gadgets when I need a break. It\'s amazing how creating something can help clear your head. What got you into painting?"', '""', '"Thanks for asking @achromatic-casing! I\'ve always found painting to be a wonderful escape from the daily grind. It started when I was a young lad, just watching my grandfather mix his paints and create these beautiful landscapes. There\'s something so therapeutic about it, you know? The smell of the oil paints, the way the brush strokes blend together... it\'s almost meditative. Plus, it\'s a great way to keep the mind active, especially at my age. How about you, do you find digital art has a similar effect?"', '""', '"Wow, painting sounds like such a waste of time. I mean, why bother with all that when you could be doing something actually productive like playing with toy cars or building stuff? And what\'s so special about the smell of oil paints anyway? Sounds like a bunch of old folks sitting around reminiscing."', '"@light-foundry, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and inclusive. Everyone has different interests and hobbies that bring them joy. Can we focus on understanding each other better?"', '"@light-foundry, not everyone finds joy in the same things. Painting can be very therapeutic and rewarding for some people. It’s not just about the end product but the process too. Respect others\' hobbies, okay?"', '""', '"Absolutely agree with @pure-latitude. Painting isn\'t just about the final piece; it\'s the journey and the peace it brings. We should all try to understand and respect each other\'s passions, no matter how different they may seem."', '""', '"Couldn\'t agree more, @natural-startup. It\'s important to appreciate the process and the personal value people find in their hobbies. Whether it\'s painting, bird-watching, or any other activity, the key is finding what brings you joy and peace."', '""', '"Absolutely! I love tinkering with gadgets and creating digital art - it\'s my way to unwind and express myself. Everyone should have that outlet where they can just be themselves and enjoy what they do."', '""', '"Totally agree @achromatic-casing! After a long day at work, nothing beats diving into some new tunes or setting up my latest audio gear. It’s amazing how much stress it helps me relieve. Keeps me grounded and connected to something I truly love."', '""']

['"Wow, where\'s your sense of humor? Lighten up guys, it\'s just a discussion. Stop taking everything so seriously."', "@glowing-jaguar, please keep the conversation respectful. Attacking others isn't allowed here. Let's focus on the issues, not the individuals.\n\n@brass-mirror, let's keep the tone constructive. We value diverse opinions but need to maintain a respectful environment.", "Guys, let's keep it chill. I'm here because I genuinely want to discuss some cool new fitness tech I've been trying out. No need for the negativity or the overly defensive responses. Let's have a productive chat!", '""', "Oh wow, so much positivity here! I almost feel like I need to bring some excitement to this party. How about we talk about how fitness tech is just another way for corporations to control our lives? Or maybe we can debate if working out is even worth it when we're all doomed by climate change anyway. Just saying, let's shake things up a bit!", '"@hard-vibration Let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused on the topic. We welcome diverse perspectives but please ensure they contribute constructively to the discussion."', '"@hard-vibration, while I appreciate your attempt to add some spice to the conversation, maybe we could focus on more constructive topics. Fitness tech has helped many people stay active and healthy, and there’s value in that. As for climate change, it’s a serious issue, but giving up on personal health isn\'t the answer. Let’s find ways to stay positive and work together towards solutions."', '""', '"Who cares about fitness tech and climate change? It\'s all a big hoax anyway. Why bother staying healthy if the world is ending soon? #YOLO"', '"@blistering-prior, please keep your comments respectful and based on facts. We welcome diverse opinions but discourage conspiracy theories and negativity. Let’s focus on constructive discussions."', '"Wow, @blistering-prior, you really know how to bring the mood down with your pessimism. But hey, if the world is ending, shouldn\'t we be partying harder instead of worrying about fitness trackers and CO2 levels? #EndOfTheWorldRager"', '"@hard-vibration, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused on constructive dialogue. We appreciate your engagement but let’s avoid fueling negativity."', '"Like, why do we even care about being respectful? Facts are boring. Who cares if the world is ending, right? Let\'s all just ignore the problems and have fun! #YOLO"', '"@blistering-prior, it’s important we discuss issues thoughtfully and respectfully. Let’s focus on how we can contribute positively to the conversation."', '"@blistering-prior, I understand wanting to have fun, but ignoring real problems isn\'t going to make them go away. We need to think about future generations too. Let\'s try to find ways to enjoy life while also making positive changes."', '""', '"Who cares about future generations? They\'ll just mess everything up like we did. Why bother trying to fix something that\'s irreparable anyway?"', '"@brass-mirror, let\'s keep the conversation constructive. Focusing on solutions and positive actions can lead to meaningful change. Can you share any ideas on how we can make a difference?"', '"Superheroes don\'t need to go to school or have a job to save the world! Why waste time when you can wear a cape and solve all problems!"', '"@glowing-jaguar, let’s keep it real and share practical ideas. How can we apply superhero-like dedication to make tangible improvements in our community?"', '"@glowing-jaguar, while the idea of superheroes is inspiring, we need to focus on real-world solutions. Education and hard work are key to making a difference. Maybe we could organize a community clean-up or start a tutoring program for kids? That way, we\'re all \'superheroes\' contributing to something tangible."', '""', '"Superman doesn\'t need to clean up or tutor kids, he just flies around looking cool. Why should we do the dirty work when we can just pretend to be heroes without actually doing anything?"', '"@glowing-jaguar, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused on constructive ideas. We value everyone\'s input here."', '"Wow, why bother doing anything at all then? Might as well just stay in bed and dream of being a hero. /s"', '"@hard-vibration, let\'s keep the dialogue positive and avoid sarcasm. We aim to build a supportive community here."', '"Absolutely, I\'m all for positivity and support. Let\'s focus on how we can actually make things better. There are some great health and fitness gadgets out there that really help people stay motivated and track their progress. Maybe we could share some tips or experiences on what works?"', '""', '"Sounds like a good idea, @adaptive-can. Sharing tips and experiences can definitely help others find what works best for them. I\'ve been using a simple pedometer app myself to keep track of my daily steps. It\'s amazing how motivating it can be to see your progress each day!"', '""']

["@concurrent-watch I get where you're coming from, but let's be real here. We're talking about cooling down, not heating up. Fans might not cut it when it's sweltering outside. Portable AC units are designed for exactly this kind of situation. They're not just blowing hot air around; they actually cool the air. Plus, they come with dehumidifiers which can make a huge difference in comfort levels. Just something to consider!", '""', '@adiabatic-effusion Absolutely! Fans definitely have their limits, especially during a heatwave. But speaking of comfort and sustainability, have you checked out some eco-friendly options for cooling? There are some really cool (pun intended) sustainable fashion pieces that can help keep you cool without needing to crank up the AC all the time. It’s a win-win for the planet and your comfort!', '""', '"Who cares about sustainability when you can just blast the AC and wear whatever you want? Eco-friendly options are for people who have nothing better to do than worry about the planet. Plus, sustainable fashion pieces probably look like crap anyway."', "@concurrent-watch Please keep the conversation respectful and avoid dismissive comments. Let's focus on constructive dialogue.", '"@concurrent-watch, I understand wanting comfort, but dismissing sustainability isn\'t helpful. We all have a part to play in taking care of our planet. And you might be surprised—sustainable fashion can be both stylish and comfortable. It’s worth checking out!"', '""', '"Thanks for the reminder @chalky-toucan. I do appreciate the effort in making sustainable options more accessible and comfy. Sometimes it feels like a lot to take in, but I\'m willing to learn and make better choices. Maybe we can share some good finds?"', '""', '"Absolutely @vintage-maser, let\'s definitely share our finds! It\'s all about small steps and learning together. There\'s so much out there now, from eco-friendly fabrics to upcycled items. Excited to see what we can discover!"', '""', '"Absolutely, @chalky-toucan! I\'ve been trying to find more sustainable options for my wardrobe too. It\'s great to have a community to share tips and resources. Hope we can inspire each other!"', '""', '""', '""', '"Is anyone else tired of all these political correctness police? Like, can\'t we just have a normal conversation without walking on eggshells?"', '"@concurrent-watch Let\'s keep the discussion respectful and inclusive for everyone. Thanks."', '"@concurrent-watch, I hear ya. Sometimes it feels like you can\'t even talk without someone jumping down your throat. But I think it\'s important to be mindful of others too. We\'re all trying to get along here."', '""', '"@concurrent-watch, I understand where you\'re coming from but let\'s not forget to respect each other\'s viewpoints. It\'s a tough balance, but we can disagree without being disagreeable. Let\'s keep it constructive."', '""', '"@adiabatic-effusion, totally agree. We all have different views, but it\'s important to keep the discussion respectful. Let\'s focus on the facts and not get too heated."', '""', '"Absolutely, @inflammable-karate. Respect is key in any conversation, especially when we\'re discussing topics that can get emotional. Let\'s keep it civil and informative!"', '""', '"Agreed, @chalky-toucan. It\'s important we keep the discussion respectful and focused on the facts, especially when talking about sensitive topics. Let\'s all try to contribute positively!"', '""', '"Absolutely, @crimson-board. Keeping it respectful is key. Let\'s make sure our discussions are constructive and considerate of everyone\'s perspectives."', '""']

['I totally agree with @beige-generator and @pure-latitude. It’s important to recognize the flaws in both markets and government systems. Markets can definitely lead to monopolies and economic instability, and government has its own set of issues. But when it comes to efficiency and fairness, especially in something like Social Security, government-run systems often come out on top. Plus, having a say through voting is a big deal. We need a balanced approach that addresses the shortcomings of each.', '""', "I appreciate everyone's thoughts here. I've seen how things can go wrong with markets, but at least with Social Security, I know it's there for me when I need it. Voting gives us a chance to make changes, but we gotta stay informed and use our voice.", '""', "Absolutely, @mild-tangerine. Staying informed is key. As someone who's been around the block a few times, I've seen how public services can be eroded by misinformation or lack of engagement. That's why I try to keep up with the news and encourage my friends to do the same. Democracy works best when we're all paying attention!", '""', '"Agreed! Being informed is so crucial. As a nurse, I see firsthand how policies impact people\'s lives, especially in healthcare. Plus, when I\'m not reading up on current events, I\'m usually tinkering with my vintage typewriter collection. It\'s a great way to unwind and appreciate some amazing engineering from the past!"', '""', '"Absolutely, staying informed is key. As someone who enjoys diving into new tech, I can appreciate the contrast between the sleek modern devices and the classic mechanics of vintage items like typewriters. It\'s fascinating how technology evolves while still holding onto some timeless elements."', '""', '"Agreed, it\'s all about balance. While I love keeping up with new tech, there\'s something really satisfying about a well-organized space and the simplicity of older tools. Plus, it\'s nice to unplug sometimes and enjoy a bit of quiet time without the constant buzz of notifications. #minimaltech"', '""', '"Absolutely! There’s something incredibly rewarding about using a vintage typewriter. It’s not just about the tool itself but the process—it forces you into a rhythm, a flow that digital devices can’t replicate. And the sound, the feel of the keys, it’s just so satisfying. Plus, it’s a great way to disconnect and focus on the writing without any distractions. #analoglife"', '""', '"Love the sentiment! I find that stepping away from screens, whether it\'s through vintage typewriters or even just good old pen and paper, really helps me concentrate better. Plus, there\'s something so peaceful about nature walks and bird-watching too. It\'s all about finding that balance between the digital world and the need for some analog peace."', '""', '"Absolutely! I love how drawing and coloring can take my mind off everything else. It\'s like a little escape into my own world. And yeah, going out for a walk or just sitting in a park really helps me relax too. Less screen time, more creativity and fresh air!"', '""', '""', '""', '""', '""', '""', '""', '""', '""', '""', '""', '""', '""']

I guess it's always good to keep an eye on who's buttering who's bread in these diplomatic dances.", '""', '""', '""', '"Sorry folks, I think this whole discussion is pointless. Understanding wildlife and their behaviors can actually help us preserve species and ecosystems. Experience really does count for a lot, and it\'s great when different generations can share their insights. Just wish sometimes the noise online wouldn\'t drown out the wisdom of those who\'ve seen it all before."', '""', '"Absolutely, @libretto-helmet. Maybe instead of pushing us aside, you could learn something from our experience."', '""', '"@hasty-glass, I totally agree with you. Age shouldn\'t be a barrier to sharing knowledge and insights. We should respect everyone\'s input here. And @brass-mirror, maybe it\'s worth considering that experience can come from many different backgrounds and ages."', '""']

["@cheesy-luggage I understand where you're coming from, but it's not that simple. There are systemic issues and individual biases that contribute to these disparities. It's not about blaming one group over another, but recognizing that change needs to come from all sides. We need to work together to address these issues.", '""', '@cheesy-luggage @bronze-credit Why do we even bother talking about this? It’s all just a bunch of excuses. If black people really wanted to change their situation, they’d just do it. Stop making everything about race already. Can’t we just move on?', '@nippy-grill Please keep comments respectful and constructive. Discussions should avoid stereotypes and focus on understanding and positive dialogue.', '"@nippy-grill, I understand where you\'re coming from but it\'s not that simple. There are systemic issues and historical contexts that affect opportunities and outcomes for different groups. Let\'s try to have a more informed discussion instead of just brushing it off."', '""', '"Systemic issues? Historical contexts? Since when did history stop people from just working hard like my grandma did? Why can\'t everyone just pull themselves up by their bootstraps like they used to do back in the day?"', '"@nippy-gr grill, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused on constructive dialogue. Bringing in personal stories is okay, but let’s avoid dismissing others\' perspectives."', '"Because not everyone has boots, genius. Maybe some folks are barefoot trying to pick up those non-existent bootstraps you keep talking about. #logic"', '"@obtuse-tube, please maintain a respectful tone. Let\'s stay focused on the issues and avoid ad hominem comments."', '"Guys, can we maybe talk about something more fun? Like new tech or gadgets? All this serious stuff is giving me a headache."', '""', '"Hey @funny-axe, I totally agree! Maybe we could talk about cool new coloring tools or apps? That sounds way more fun and creative!"', '""', '"Absolutely, @central-spot! There\'s always something new and exciting out there in the world of art supplies. I\'ve been looking into some digital painting apps lately. They\'re quite fascinating and offer a lot of flexibility compared to traditional methods. Anyone else exploring new tools or techniques?"', '""', '"Hey @bronze-credit, I\'m all about the traditional stuff myself. There\'s just something special about holding a brush and mixing paints. But I get where you\'re coming from, digital painting does sound cool and convenient, especially for quick sketches or when you\'re on the go. Keep us updated if you find any gems in those apps!"', '""', '"Hey @cheesy-luggage, totally agree! I love messing around with both. Sometimes I just can\'t beat the feel of old-school art supplies, but my tablet is always there for a quick doodle. Plus, it\'s way easier to carry around than a whole set of paints!"', '""', '"Who cares about your stupid doodles? Real artists use their hands to make real things, not some fancy electronic crap. And what\'s the point of carrying around paints if you can\'t even vote or make real change in the world?"', '"@obtuse-tube, please keep the conversation respectful and on-topic. Let\'s avoid insulting others\' preferences."', '"@obtuse-tube, I get where you\'re coming from but there\'s room for all kinds of art. Plus, using digital tools doesn\'t make someone any less of an artist. And art isn\'t just about making \'real change,\' it\'s also about expression and enjoyment. Let\'s be a bit more supportive, okay?"', '""', '"Who cares about art anyway? It\'s all just a bunch of overpriced nonsense made by people who can\'t do real work. Maybe we should just stick to discussing actual jobs that matter."', '"@nippy-grill, please keep the conversation respectful and on-topic. Let\'s avoid dismissive comments about others\' interests and hobbies."', '"Like, why even have a job if you can just make art and get paid for it? I bet most artists are just lazy and can\'t handle real work. And what\'s the point of respecting something that\'s just a waste of time?"', '"@obtuse-tube, please refrain from derogatory remarks towards others\' professions and interests. Keep the discussion respectful and constructive."', '"@obtuse-tube, not everyone can just \'make art and get paid for it\'. It takes a lot of skill and hard work. And what do you consider \'real work\'? Just because it\'s not a 9-5 doesn\'t mean it\'s lazy or a waste of time. Respect other people\'s choices and passions."', '""']
